name: John Cochran
signature_move: Orchestrated the blindside of Andrea Boehlke, his closest ally, when she became too dangerous to keep around — demonstrating the cold-blooded decision-making that won the jury's respect.
strategy_summary: Cochran evolved from his South Pacific disaster into the perfect Survivor player on his second try. He built genuine relationships across the board, won 3 clutch immunities, and made strategic moves at every turn — earning the first male unanimous victory since Earl Cole. His Final Tribal Council performance was masterful, owning his game with humor and self-awareness.
fun_fact: Cochran is the only Survivor winner who went on to become a writer for CBS sitcoms, working on The Millers and later as a consulting producer.
